name: the-ploradian
description: Static satirical technology and business newspaper with automated Cloudflare Worker publishing.

scripts.build: npm run sync:prompt && npm run build --workspace @ploradian/web && npm run build --workspace @ploradian/worker
scripts.deploy:web: npm run build --workspace @ploradian/web && npx wrangler pages deploy apps/web/dist --project-name the-ploradian
scripts.deploy:worker: npm run build --workspace @ploradian/web && npm run deploy --workspace @ploradian/worker
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @ploradian/web && npm run typecheck --workspace @ploradian/worker
